# Pre Packaged Tool

A dependency that is synced from a pre-packaged tool. The sync process will create a pull request that adds the necessary configuration files to integrate the specified pre-packaged tool into the target repository.

## Properties

### `type`

Type: `"pre-packaged-tool"`

### `automerge`

Type: `boolean`

Default: `False`

Whether pull requests for this dependency should be automatically merged if all checks pass.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> The `microsoft-fde-bot` GitHub App must be given pull request approval bypass permissions to your repository in order to automerge PRs. You can configure this for your repository in the [`Pulumi.microsoft.yml`](https://github.com/microsoft/fde-mgmt/blob/main/infra/github/Pulumi.microsoft.yml) file.

### `name`

Type: `"openapi-sdk-gen"`

The name of the pre-packaged tool to be synced.

## Examples

```yaml
type: pre-packaged-tool
name: openapi-sdk-gen
```
```yaml
type: pre-packaged-tool
automerge: true
name: openapi-sdk-gen
```
